title: The Cheerful Fraud
writer: K.R.G. Browne, Harvey F. Thew, Leigh Jason
actors: Reginald Denny, Gertrude Olmstead, Otis Harlan
plot: Sir Michael Fairlie meets Ann Kent, a social secretary to the Bytheways, during a rainstorm in London, and though she snubs him, he promptly falls in love. He intercepts Simmons, an employee of the family, and, buying off his job,...
